scenarios.title: Market OPEN: Geopolitical/Macro Expansion
scenarios.reasoning:
MARKET WILL ROUGHLY GAP DOWN IN NIFTY PRE-TRADING WITH 258-278 POINTS, BUT BULLISH PRESSURE MAY ARISE LEADING IT TO RECOVER BY 64-84 POINTS BY THE TIME THE PRE-TRADING SESSION ENDS. THE MARKET WILL OFFICIALLY OPEN AROUND 24081 - 24111 DUE TO AUTOMATED VALUE BUYING AND MEAN REVERSION.

Algorithmic Logic: Global bearish sentiment fundamentally overrides the 24250 Max Pain support floor. The gap down forces panicked long liquidations early on. However, opening at a 258-point deficit immediately shoves the hourly RSI into oversold territory (<30) and stretches the price far below the 50-period moving average. This triggers automated mean-reversion algorithms to step in, closing the gap slightly by 64-84 points before the 9:15 AM official open as smart money absorbs retail panic selling.

scenarios.title: Market CLOSE: Exhaustion & Liquidity Fade
scenarios.reasoning:
MARKET SESSION WILL BE HIGHLY VOLATILE POST THE 24096 OFFICIAL OPENING LEVEL TRIGGERED BY OVERNIGHT MACRO SHOCKS. DURING THE TRADING SESSION, DUE TO SEVERE CALL-WRITING RESISTANCE AND NEGATIVE DEALER GAMMA COMPRESSION, BEARISH PROFIT BOOKING WILL ARISE LEADING TO A REVERSION TARGET OF 24141 - 24191 BY THE TIME THE SETTLEMENT CLOSE OCCURS.

Algorithmic Logic: Should the initial shock fail to sustain institutional momentum beyond the first trading hour, heavy algorithmic call-writing resistance and negative Dealer Gamma will physically block further ascent. Market makers will aggressively short volatility (IV Crush) to drag the spot price back toward the underlying statistical Max Pain locus at 24250, attempting to close the session materially lower than the violent opening gap.
